testcase.name: tc_fr03_ui_01_overallUiLayout

failure.message: Zoom/pan controls are not present expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.name: tc_fr03_ui_02_modelCardStructure
testcase.system-out: TC_FR03_UI_02 - PASS: Model card structure displayed clearly.

testcase.name: tc_fr03_ui_03_dataTypeIconDisplay
testcase.system-out: TC_FR03_UI_03 - PASS: Distinct and recognizable icons/colors are shown for different SQL data types.

testcase.name: tc_fr03_ui_04_testModelNameInputEmpty
testcase.system-out: TC_FR03_UI_04 - PASS: UI blocks save action and shows warning:

testcase.name: tc_fr03_ui_07_testAttributeNameDuplicate
testcase.system-out: TC_FR03_UI_07 - PASS: UI blocks the input showing a concise 'Column name must be unique' message.

testcase.name: tc_fr03_ui_08_testAttributeDataTypeEnum
testcase.system-out: TC_FR03_UI_08 - PASS: UI highlights the field asking for required ENUM values in red.

testcase.name: tc_fr03_ui_09_testAddTableButton
testcase.system-out: TC_FR03_UI_09 - PASS: Button is always enabled. Triggers smoothly with visual ripple effect.

testcase.name: tc_fr03_ui_10_testExportJsonButton
testcase.system-out: TC_FR03_UI_10 - PASS: Cursor changes to pointer. Tooltip indicates exact format to be exported.

testcase.name: tc_fr03_fn_01_addModelFunction
testcase.system-out: TC_FR03_FN_01 - PASS: A new model component is successfully instantiated in the React Flow store and rendered.

testcase.name: tc_fr03_fn_02_moveModelCoordinates
testcase.system-out: TC_FR03_FN_02 - PASS: Node position updates accurately in the state. Connections reroute dynamically.

testcase.name: tc_fr03_fn_04_deleteConnectedModel
testcase.system-out: TC_FR03_FN_04 - PASS: Cascade deletion works: Model + all connected Edges are swept from memory.

testcase.name: tc_fr03_fn_06_addAttributeToModel
testcase.system-out: TC_FR03_FN_06 - PASS: A new row is pushed to the node's attributes array.

testcase.name: tc_fr03_fn_07_deleteAttribute
testcase.system-out: TC_FR03_FN_07 - PASS: The exact attribute is spliced from the array.

testcase.name: tc_fr03_fn_08_togglePrimaryKeyStatus
testcase.system-out: TC_FR03_FN_08 - PASS: The boolean isPrimaryKey flips and triggers a re-render.

testcase.name: tc_fr03_fn_09_changeDataTypeLogic
testcase.system-out: TC_FR03_FN_09 - PASS: The type property is updated to string 'INT'.

testcase.name: tc_fr03_fn_10_addConnection
testcase.system-out: TC_FR03_FN_10 - PASS: Edge is pushed to React Flow. sourceHandle and targetHandle reference correct IDs.

testcase.name: tc_fr03_fn_11_deleteConnection
testcase.system-out: TC_FR03_FN_11 - PASS: The edge object is filtered out of the connection array.

testcase.name: tc_fr03_fn_12_graphCircularDependency

failure.message: Algorithm fails to detect cycle, allowing circular connection which causes infinite loops later.

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Algorithm fails to detect cycle, allowing circular connection which causes infinite loops later. at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at testcase.name: tc_fr03_fn_14_exportPngCanvasCapture
testcase.system-out: TC_FR03_FN_14 - PASS: html-to-image renders exactly what is inside the viewport with transparent background.
